title: convolvulus cneorum
intro: Convolvulus cneorum, also known as the silverbush or bush morning glory, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Convolvulus cneorum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Convolvulus cneorum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
